restart_required.title: Restart required
restart_required.description: The IR Remote integration has been updated. Restart Home Assistant to apply the changes.

user.title: Set up IR Remote
user.description:
Enter the MQTT topic prefix for this bridge. It must match exactly what was set during bridge install.

Not sure what it is? SSH into the Pi Zero and run:
```
cat /etc/ir-bridge/env
```

Add the integration once per bridge, each with its own unique prefix.

data_description.topic_prefix: Must match the prefix in /etc/ir-bridge/env on the Pi Zero (e.g. ir_remote_amp). Each bridge must have its own unique prefix.

error.mqtt_not_configured: MQTT is not configured in Home Assistant. Set it up first under Settings → Devices & Services → MQTT.
error.pi_offline: Could not reach the IR bridge. Make sure it is running and connected to the MQTT broker.

abort.already_configured: This IR Remote is already configured.
